title: glyceria magellanica
intro: Glyceria magellanica, also known as water buffalo grass or fakahatchee grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Glyceria magellanica include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting healthy skin. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat various health issues.
